name: snapuml
description: PlantUML compatible diagram generator for the web

scripts.build: npm run type-check && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/snapuml.js --platform=browser --format=iife --global-name=snapuml && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/snapuml.min.js --platform=browser --format=iife --global-name=snapuml && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/snapuml.esm.mjs --platform=browser --format=esm && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/snapuml.esm.min.mjs --platform=browser --format=esm
scripts.deploy: npm test && npm run build && mkdir -p build/dist && cp index.html build/ && cp -r dist/* build/dist/ && touch build/.nojekyll && gh-pages -d build

author: Atsushi Funakoshi
